title: pouteria sphaerocarpa
intro: Pouteria sphaerocarpa, also known as the Brazilian walnut or courbaril, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pouteria sphaerocarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of fever and respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Pouteria sphaerocarpa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
